Data Disclaimer & Attribution

Source & scope: Traffic sign data sourced from the publicly accessible Transport for NSW (TfNSW) signage catalogue. Data reflects a point-in-time snapshot collected on 14 May 2026 and may not reflect current standards or approvals.

Normalizations: Some field values have been remapped for consistency (e.g. technical reference names). All transformations are transparent and visible in the repository scripts, mappings, and patch files.

Not official: This is an independent reference tool. It is not endorsed by, affiliated with, or an official publication of Transport for NSW or the NSW Government.

No warranty / use at own risk: Always verify requirements against current official TfNSW standards, legislation, and approvals before use in any design, engineering, or compliance context. The maintainers accept no liability for any decisions, works, or outcomes arising from use of this tool.

Copyright: Tool code © 2026 Val Belets, MIT licence. Sign images and source data remain © Transport for NSW / NSW Government.
